title: How to Change the Models Path in ComfyUI: Step-by-Step Guide
description:
In this tutorial, I’ll walk you through how to change the model paths in ComfyUI, helping you keep all your models organized and save space on your hard drive. Whether you're managing multiple ComfyUI installations or working with models from other UIs, this guide will show you how to efficiently set custom model paths.

Unlock exclusive perks by joining our channel:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCmMbwA-s3GZDKVzGZ-kPwaQ/join

Go to google drive
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1JIutefp1XCwrYh45dIKCR-gb2BRt3mT5?usp=sharing

If your models are located in another ComfyUI folder:

1. Open the "Models Inside Other ComfyUI" folder.
2. Download the extra_model_paths.yaml file.
3. Place it in the ComfyUI_windows_portable\ComfyUI folder. To verify you're in the correct location, you should see the main.py file in this folder.
4. Open the extra_model_paths.yaml file with Notepad, add your ComfyUI path, save the file, and restart ComfyUI.
